From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Term Sharing via Hash-Consing — Benchmark
    DAG representation for a dependently typed calculus with inductives.
    Based on the term language from github.com/Scidonia/cyclic *)

(** ** Term language *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat)
| tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm)
| tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm)
| tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat)
| tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x)
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.

Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub :=
  scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x
  | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Term size *)

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

(** ** Closedness *)

Fixpoint closed_below (n : nat) (t : tm) : bool :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => x <? n
  | tSort _ | tInd _ => true
  | tPi A B => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) B
  | tLam A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tApp t u => closed_below n t && closed_below n u
  | tFix A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tRoll _ _ args =>
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs =>
      closed_below n s && closed_below (S n) C &&
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) brs
  end.

Definition closed (t : tm) : Prop := closed_below 0 t = true.

(** ** DAG representation *)

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat)
| nSort (i : nat)
| nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat)
| nApp (t u : nat)
| nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat)
| nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

(** ** Decidable equality on nodes (infrastructure — proved) *)

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Lemma node_eqb_eq : forall n1 n2, node_eqb n1 n2 = true <-> n1 = n2.
Proof.
  intros. unfold node_eqb. destruct (node_eq_dec n1 n2); split; intros; auto; discriminate.
Qed.

(** ** Interning: lookup-or-append *)

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

(** ** Sharing: tree → DAG *)

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) :=
        (fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with
          | [] => (acc, [])
          | t0 :: rest =>
              let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
              let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
              (acc2, idx :: idxs)
          end) brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end.

(** ** Unfolding: DAG → tree *)

Fixpoint unfold (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (idx : nat) : option tm :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => None
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => None
    | Some (nVar x) => Some (tVar x)
    | Some (nSort i) => Some (tSort i)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' b with
        | Some A, Some B => Some (tPi A B)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nLam a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tLam A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nApp t u) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' t, unfold tbl fuel' u with
        | Some T, Some U => Some (tApp T U)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nFix a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tFix A T)
        | _, _ => None
        end
    | Some (nInd Ix) => Some (tInd Ix)
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        match (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) args with
        | Some ts => Some (tRoll Ix c ts)
        | None => None
        end
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' s, unfold tbl fuel' m,
              (fix go (l : list nat) :=
                 match l with
                 | [] => Some []
                 | i :: l' =>
                     match unfold tbl fuel' i, go l' with
                     | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
                     | _, _ => None
                     end
                 end) brs with
        | Some Sc, Some Mo, Some Bs => Some (tCase Ix Sc Mo Bs)
        | _, _, _ => None
        end
    end
  end.

(** ** DAG-level substitution for closed terms *)

(** Substitute the DAG term at [u_idx] for variable [target] throughout the
    DAG term at [idx]. Under binders (Pi, Lam, Fix, Case motive), [target]
    is incremented. Because [u] is closed, its DAG node [u_idx] is valid at
    every binder depth without shifting. *)

Fixpoint dag_subst_closed
  (tbl : dag) (u_idx : nat) (target : nat) (idx : nat) (fuel : nat)
  : dag * nat :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => (tbl, idx)
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nVar x) =>
        if Nat.eqb x target then (tbl, u_idx)
        else if target <? x then intern (nVar (x - 1)) tbl
        else (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nSort _) | Some (nInd _) => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, b') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) b fuel' in
        intern (nPi a' b') tbl2
    | Some (nLam a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nLam a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nApp ti ui) =>
        let '(tbl1, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target ti fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, u') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx target ui fuel' in
        intern (nApp t' u') tbl2
    | Some (nFix a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nFix a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        let '(tbl1, args') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl args in
        intern (nRoll Ix c args') tbl1
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        let '(tbl1, s') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target s fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, m') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) m fuel' in
        let '(tbl3, brs') :=
          (fix go tbl0 (l : list nat) :=
            match l with
            | [] => (tbl0, [])
            | i :: l' =>
                let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl0 u_idx target i fuel' in
                let '(tbl2, is') := go tbl1 l' in
                (tbl2, i' :: is')
            end) tbl2 brs in
        intern (nCase Ix s' m' brs') tbl3
    end
  end.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma intern_length_succ : forall n tbl,
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= S (length tbl).
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; try lia.
  rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_preserve : forall n tbl i,
  i < length tbl ->
  nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) i = nth_error tbl i.
Proof.
  intros n tbl i Hi. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; auto.
  rewrite nth_error_app1; auto.
Qed.

Lemma intern_extends : forall n tbl,
  exists prefix, fst (intern n tbl) = tbl ++ prefix.
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0).
  - exists []; auto.
  - exists [n]; rewrite app_nil_r; auto.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth_error : forall n tbl,
  nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) (snd (intern n tbl)) = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl.
  unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) eqn:H.
  - simpl. clear H.
    induction tbl as [|h t IH] in n, s |- *; simpl in *.
    { discriminate. }
    destruct (node_eqb n h) eqn:E.
    + assert (s = 0) by (destruct s; [lia|discriminate]).
      subst. simpl. rewrite E. reflexivity.
    + destruct s; [discriminate|]. simpl. apply IH.
  - simpl. rewrite nth_error_app2; [|lia].
    replace (length tbl - length tbl) with 0 by lia.
    simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_app_prefix : forall (A : Type) (l1 l2 : list A) (i : nat),
  i < length l1 ->
  nth_error (l1 ++ l2) i = nth_error l1 i.
Proof.
  induction l1; simpl; intros; try lia.
  destruct i; auto. apply IHl1. lia.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_success_fuel : forall fuel tbl idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t ->
  forall fuel', fuel' >= fuel ->
  unfold tbl fuel' idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold.
  - simpl in Hunfold. discriminate.
  - simpl in Hunfold.
    destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
    destruct n; try (
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold;
      intros fuel' Hfuel;
      destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl; rewrite Hnth; reflexivity
    ).
    + (* nPi *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel.
      destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia].
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB n); [|lia].
      reflexivity.
    + (* nLam *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel.
      destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia].
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia].
      reflexivity.
    + (* nApp *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel.
      destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT n); [|lia].
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU n); [|lia].
      reflexivity.
    + (* nFix *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel.
      destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia].
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia].
      reflexivity.
    + (* nRoll *)
      destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) :=
        match l with
        | [] => Some []
        | i :: l' =>
            match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with
            | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel.
      destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      assert (Hts' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
        match l0 with
        | [] => Some []
        | i :: l'0 =>
            match unfold tbl n i, go l'0 with
            | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l = Some ts).
      { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hfuel.
        induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
            match l0 with
            | [] => Some []
            | i0 :: l'0 =>
                match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with
                | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
                | _, _ => None
                end
            end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
        inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts.
        rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia].
        rewrite IHl; auto.
      }
      rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
    + (* nCase *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
      destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) :=
        match l with
        | [] => Some []
        | i :: l' =>
            match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with
            | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel.
      destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc n); [|lia].
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo n); [|lia].
      assert (HBs' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
        match l0 with
        | [] => Some []
        | i :: l'0 =>
            match unfold tbl n i, go l'0 with
            | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l = Some Bs).
      { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hfuel.
        induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
            match l0 with
            | [] => Some []
            | i0 :: l'0 =>
                match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with
                | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
                | _, _ => None
                end
            end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
        inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs.
        rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia].
        rewrite IHl; auto.
      }
      rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_preserve : forall fuel tbl idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t ->
  forall tbl',
    (forall j, j < length tbl -> nth_error tbl' j = nth_error tbl j) ->
    unfold tbl' fuel idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold.
  - simpl in Hunfold. discriminate.
  - simpl in Hunfold.
    destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
    apply nth_error_Some_length in Hnth as Hidx.
    destruct n; try (
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold;
      intros tbl' Hagree;
      destruct fuel; [|]; simpl;
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; reflexivity
    ).
    + (* nPi *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree.
      destruct fuel; simpl.
      { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree).
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB tbl' Hagree).
      reflexivity.
    + (* nLam *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree.
      destruct fuel; simpl.
      { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree).
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT tbl' Hagree).
      reflexivity.
    + (* nApp *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree.
      destruct fuel; simpl.
      { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT tbl' Hagree).
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU tbl' Hagree).
      reflexivity.
    + (* nFix *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree.
      destruct fuel; simpl.
      { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree).
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT tbl' Hagree).
      reflexivity.
    + (* nRoll *)
      destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) :=
        match l with
        | [] => Some []
        | i :: l' =>
            match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with
            | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree.
      destruct fuel; simpl.
      { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      assert (Hts' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
        match l0 with
        | [] => Some []
        | i :: l'0 =>
            match unfold tbl' fuel i, go l'0 with
            | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l = Some ts).
      { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hagree.
        induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
            match l0 with
            | [] => Some []
            | i0 :: l'0 =>
                match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with
                | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
                | _, _ => None
                end
            end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
        inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts.
        rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi tbl' Hagree).
        rewrite IHl; auto.
      }
      rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
    + (* nCase *)
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
      destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) :=
        match l with
        | [] => Some []
        | i :: l' =>
            match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with
            | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree.
      destruct fuel; simpl.
      { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc tbl' Hagree).
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo tbl' Hagree).
      assert (HBs' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
        match l0 with
        | [] => Some []
        | i :: l'0 =>
            match unfold tbl' fuel i, go l'0 with
            | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
            | _, _ => None
            end
        end) l = Some Bs).
      { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hagree.
        induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
        destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
            match l0 with
            | [] => Some []
            | i0 :: l'0 =>
                match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with
                | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
                | _, _ => None
                end
            end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
        inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs.
        rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi tbl' Hagree).
        rewrite IHl; auto.
      }
      rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Theorems *)

(** *** share_size_le: DAG size ≤ tree size *)

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl,
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - (* tLam *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - (* tApp *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp f a)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - (* tFix *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - (* tRoll *)
    set (go := fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end).
    destruct (go l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= (fix sum (ts : list tm) : nat :=
      match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum rest end) l + length tbl).
    { subst go.
      induction l as [|t0 l' IHl] in tbl, Ego |- *; simpl in *.
      - inversion Ego; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh.
        simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
            match ts with
            | [] => (acc, [])
            | t1 :: rest0 =>
                let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc in
                let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in
                (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
            end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
        pose proof (IHt0 tbl) as IHt0'. rewrite Esh in IHt0'.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'.
        simpl; lia.
    }
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    set (go := fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with
      | [] => (acc, [])
      | t0 :: rest =>
          let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
          let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
          (acc2, idx :: idxs)
      end).
    destruct (go l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= (fix sum (ts : list tm) : nat :=
      match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum rest end) l + length tbl2).
    { subst go.
      induction l as [|t0 l' IHl] in tbl2, Ego |- *; simpl in *.
      - inversion Ego; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 tbl2) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh.
        simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
            match ts with
            | [] => (acc, [])
            | t1 :: rest0 =>
                let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc in
                let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in
                (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
            end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
        pose proof (IHt0 tbl2) as IHt0'. rewrite Esh in IHt0'.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'.
        simpl; lia.
    }
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof.
  intro H. pose proof (share_size_le) as Hpos. auto.
Qed.

(** *** unfold_share: round-trip correctness *)

Lemma share_child_lt : forall t tbl,
  (forall i n, nth_error tbl i = Some n ->
    match n with
    | nPi a b => a < i /\ b < i
    | nLam a ti => a < i /\ ti < i
    | nApp f a => f < i /\ a < i
    | nFix a ti => a < i /\ ti < i
    | nRoll _ _ args => Forall (fun j => j < i) args
    | nCase _ s m brs => s < i /\ m < i /\ Forall (fun j => j < i) brs
    | _ => True
    end) ->
  let '(tbl', idx) := share t tbl in
  (forall i, i < length tbl -> nth_error tbl' i = nth_error tbl i) /\
  (forall i n, nth_error tbl' i = Some n ->
    match n with
    | nPi a b => a < i /\ b < i
    | nLam a ti => a < i /\ ti < i
    | nApp f a => f < i /\ a < i
    | nFix a ti => a < i /\ ti < i
    | nRoll _ _ args => Forall (fun j => j < i) args
    | nCase _ s m brs => s < i /\ m < i /\ Forall (fun j => j < i) brs
    | _ => True
    end) /\
  unfold tbl' (S idx) idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl Hwf.
  - (* tVar *)
    destruct (intern (nVar n) tbl) as [tbl' idx] eqn:E.
    split; [|split].
    + intros i Hi. erewrite intern_preserve; eauto.
    + intros i n'. unfold intern in E.
      destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nVar n)) tbl 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E; subst; clear E.
      * simpl. apply Hwf.
      * simpl. intros Hnth.
        apply nth_error_app_inv in Hnth.
        destruct Hnth as [Hnth|[Hlen Hnth]].
        { apply Hwf with (i := i) (n := n'). exact Hnth. }
        { subst. simpl in Hnth. inversion Hnth. subst. exact I. }
    + subst. simpl.
      unfold intern in E.
      destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nVar n)) tbl 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E; subst; clear E.
      * (* found *)
        unfold unfold. simpl.
        rewrite intern_nth_error. simpl. reflexivity.
      * (* not found *)
        simpl.
        rewrite intern_nth_error. simpl. reflexivity.
  - (* tSort *)
    destruct (intern (nSort n) tbl) as [tbl' idx] eqn:E.
    split; [|split].
    + intros i Hi. erewrite intern_preserve; eauto.
    + intros i n'. unfold intern in E.
      destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nSort n)) tbl 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E; subst; clear E.
      * simpl. apply Hwf.
      * simpl. intros Hnth.
        apply nth_error_app_inv in Hnth.
        destruct Hnth as [Hnth|[Hlen Hnth]].
        { apply Hwf with (i := i) (n := n'). exact Hnth. }
        { subst. simpl in Hnth. inversion Hnth. subst. exact I. }
    + subst. simpl.
      unfold intern in E.
      destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nSort n)) tbl 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E; subst; clear E.
      * unfold unfold. simpl. rewrite intern_nth_error. simpl. reflexivity.
      * simpl. rewrite intern_nth_error. simpl. reflexivity.
  - (* tPi *)
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
    destruct (IHt1 tbl Hwf) as [Hpres1 [Hwf1 Hunfold1]].
    rewrite E1 in Hpres1, Hwf1, Hunfold1.
    destruct (IHt2 tbl1 Hwf1) as [Hpres2 [Hwf2 Hunfold2]].
    rewrite E2 in Hpres2, Hwf2, Hunfold2.
    destruct (intern (nPi a b) tbl2) as [tbl_res idx] eqn:E3.
    split; [|split].
    + intros i Hi.
      rewrite (Hpres1 i Hi).
      erewrite intern_preserve; [|apply Hpres2; assumption].
      apply Hpres2; assumption.
    + intros i n'. unfold intern in E3.
      destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E3; subst; clear E3.
      * simpl. apply Hwf2.
      * simpl. intros Hnth.
        apply nth_error_app_inv in Hnth.
        destruct Hnth as [Hnth|[Hlen Hnth]].
        { apply Hwf2 with (i := i) (n := n'). exact Hnth. }
        { subst. simpl in Hnth. inversion Hnth. subst. clear Hnth.
          split; [|split]; auto.
          (* Need: a < length tbl2 and b < length tbl2 *)
          (* Since a and b were produced by share into tbl (and tbl1), they are < length tbl1 <= length tbl2 *)
          (* But we also need a < length tbl2 and b < length tbl2 which holds since tbl2 extends tbl1 *)
          (* Actually we just need the indices to be valid, not the < relationship. *) }
    + (* The key unfold proof *)
      subst. simpl.
      (* We need: unfold tbl_res (S idx) idx = Some (tPi t1 t2) *)
      remember (fun fuel => unfold tbl_res fuel idx) as UF.
      assert (Hidx_lt_len : idx < length tbl_res).
      { apply nth_error_Some_length. rewrite intern_nth_error. congruence. }
      destruct (length tbl_res) eqn:Hlen.
      { apply nth_error_Some_length in (intern_nth_error (nPi a b) tbl2). lia. }
      simpl.
      rewrite intern_nth_error. simpl.
      (* Now we need:
         unfold tbl_res idx a = Some t1
         unfold tbl_res idx b = Some t2
      *)
      assert (Ha_lt_idx : a < idx).
      { (* This follows from the intern: either found or appended *)
        unfold intern in E3.
        destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E3; subst.
        - (* found: idx is position in tbl2 where (nPi a b) exists *)
          (* Since tbl2 satisfies Hwf2, we know a < idx *)
          simpl.
          assert (Hnth_tbl2 : nth_error tbl2 idx = Some (nPi a b)).
          { (* from find_index property, need to prove this *)
            clear -Hf n.
            induction tbl2 as [|h t IH] in idx, Hf |- *; simpl in *; try discriminate.
            destruct (node_eqb (nPi a b) h) eqn:Heq.
            - inv Hf. simpl. rewrite Heq. reflexivity.
            - apply IH. exact Hf.
          }
          apply Hwf2 in Hnth_tbl2. destruct Hnth_tbl2 as [Ha_lt _]. exact Ha_lt.
        - (* not found: idx = length tbl2 *)
          subst.
          (* Need: a < length tbl2 *)
          admit.
      }
      assert (Hb_lt_idx : b < idx).
      { (* Similar *)
        admit.
      }
      assert (Ha_unfold : unfold tbl_res idx a = Some t1).
      { apply unfold_success_fuel with (fuel := S a).
        - apply unfold_preserve with (tbl := tbl1).
          + exact Hunfold1.
          + intros j Hj.
            apply nth_error_Some_length.
            (* tbl_res preserves tbl1: they agree on indices < length tbl1 *)
            (* Since a < idx and tbl_res extends tbl1, for j < length tbl1, nth tbl_res j = nth tbl1 j *)
            admit.
        - lia.
      }
      rewrite Ha_unfold.
      admit.
      admit.
  - (* tLam, tApp, tFix, tInd, tRoll, tCase — similar, omitted for brevity *)
Abort.

(** *** share_dup_lt: strict improvement for duplicates *)

Theorem share_dup_lt : forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt_neg : ~ (forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t)).
Proof. Admitted.

(** *** dag_subst_closed_correct: DAG substitution *)

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct : forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct_neg : ~ (forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t)).
Proof. Admitted.

input.newString:
Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H.
  - discriminate.
  - destruct (f h) eqn:E.
    + inversion H; subst. exists h. split; auto.
      replace (acc - acc) with 0 by lia. simpl. reflexivity.
    + apply IH in H. destruct H as [n' [Hnth Hf]].
      exists n'. split; auto.
      replace (i - acc) with (S (i - S acc)) by lia.
      simpl. exact Hnth.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth_error : forall n tbl,
  nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) (snd (intern n tbl)) = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl.
  unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) eqn:Hf.
  - simpl.
    apply find_index_nth in Hf.
    destruct Hf as [n' [Hnth Hfb]].
    apply node_eqb_eq in Hfb. subst. exact Hnth.
  - simpl. rewrite nth_error_app2; [|lia].
    replace (length tbl - length tbl) with 0 by lia.
    simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma intern_nth_error : forall n tbl,
  nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) (snd (intern n tbl)) = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl.
  unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) eqn:H.
  - simpl. clear H.
    induction tbl as [|h t IH] in n, s |- *; simpl in *.
    { discriminate. }
    destruct (node_eqb n h) eqn:E.
    + assert (s = 0) by (destruct s; [lia|discriminate]).
      subst. simpl. rewrite E. reflexivity.
    + destruct s; [discriminate|]. simpl. apply IH.
  - simpl. rewrite nth_error_app2; [|lia].
    replace (length tbl - length tbl) with 0 by lia.
    simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

320: Lemma intern_length_succ : forall n tbl,
321:   length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= S (length tbl).
322: Proof.
323:   intros n tbl. unfold intern.
324:   destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; try lia.

328: Lemma intern_preserve : forall n tbl i,
329:   i < length tbl ->
330:   nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) i = nth_error tbl i.
331: Proof.
332:   intros n tbl i Hi. unfold intern.
333:   destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; auto.

385:   unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t ->

403:       destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
404:       rewrite Hnth; simpl.
405:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia].
406:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB n); [|lia].
407:       reflexivity.
408:     + (* nLam *)
409:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
410:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
411:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
412:       intros fuel' Hfuel.
413:       destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
414:       rewrite Hnth; simpl.
415:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia].
416:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia].
417:       reflexivity.
418:     + (* nApp *)
419:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
420:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
421:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
422:       intros fuel' Hfuel.
423:       destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
424:       rewrite Hnth; simpl.
425:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT n); [|lia].
426:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU n); [|lia].
427:       reflexivity.
428:     + (* nFix *)
429:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
430:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
431:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
432:       intros fuel' Hfuel.
433:       destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
434:       rewrite Hnth; simpl.
435:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia].
436:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia].
437:       reflexivity.
438:     + (* nRoll *)
439:       destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) :=
440:         match l with
441:         | [] => Some []
442:         | i :: l' =>
443:             match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with
444:             | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
445:             | _, _ => None
446:             end
447:         end) l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
448:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
449:       intros fuel' Hfuel.
450:       destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
451:       rewrite Hnth; simpl.
452:       assert (Hts' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
453:         match l0 with
454:         | [] => Some []
455:         | i :: l'0 =>
456:             match unfold tbl n i, go l'0 with
457:             | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
458:             | _, _ => None
459:             end
460:         end) l = Some ts).
461:       { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hfuel.
462:         induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
463:         destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
464:         destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
465:             match l0 with
466:             | [] => Some []
467:             | i0 :: l'0 =>
468:                 match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with
469:                 | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
470:                 | _, _ => None
471:                 end
472:             end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
473:         inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts.
474:         rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia].
475:         rewrite IHl; auto.
476:       }
477:       rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
478:     + (* nCase *)
479:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
480:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
481:       destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) :=
482:         match l with
483:         | [] => Some []
484:         | i :: l' =>
485:             match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with
486:             | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
487:             | _, _ => None
488:             end
489:         end) l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
490:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
491:       intros fuel' Hfuel.
492:       destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
493:       rewrite Hnth; simpl.
494:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc n); [|lia].
495:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo n); [|lia].
496:       assert (HBs' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
497:         match l0 with
498:         | [] => Some []
499:         | i :: l'0 =>
500:             match unfold tbl n i, go l'0 with
501:             | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
502:             | _, _ => None
503:             end
504:         end) l = Some Bs).
505:       { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hfuel.
506:         induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
507:         destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
508:         destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
509:             match l0 with
510:             | [] => Some []
511:             | i0 :: l'0 =>
512:                 match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with
513:                 | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
514:                 | _, _ => None
515:                 end
516:             end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
517:         inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs.
518:         rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia].
519:         rewrite IHl; auto.
520:       }
521:       rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
522: Qed.

524: Lemma unfold_preserve : forall fuel tbl idx t,
525:   unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t ->
526:   forall tbl',
527:     (forall j, j < length tbl -> nth_error tbl' j = nth_error tbl j) ->
528:     unfold tbl' fuel idx = Some t.
529: Proof.
530:   induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold.
531:   - simpl in Hunfold. discriminate.
532:   - simpl in Hunfold.
533:     destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
534:     apply nth_error_Some_length in Hnth as Hidx.
535:     destruct n; try (
536:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold;
537:       intros tbl' Hagree;
538:       destruct fuel; [|]; simpl;
539:       rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; reflexivity
540:     ).
541:     + (* nPi *)
542:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
543:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
544:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
545:       intros tbl' Hagree.
546:       destruct fuel; simpl.
547:       { discriminate. }
548:       rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
549:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree).
550:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB tbl' Hagree).
551:       reflexivity.
552:     + (* nLam *)
553:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
554:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
555:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
556:       intros tbl' Hagree.
557:       destruct fuel; simpl.
558:       { discriminate. }
559:       rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
560:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree).
561:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT tbl' Hagree).
562:       reflexivity.
563:     + (* nApp *)
564:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
565:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
566:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
567:       intros tbl' Hagree.
568:       destruct fuel; simpl.
569:       { discriminate. }
570:       rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
571:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT tbl' Hagree).
572:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU tbl' Hagree).
573:       reflexivity.
574:     + (* nFix *)
575:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
576:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
577:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
578:       intros tbl' Hagree.
579:       destruct fuel; simpl.
580:       { discriminate. }
581:       rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
582:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree).
583:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT tbl' Hagree).
584:       reflexivity.
585:     + (* nRoll *)
586:       destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) :=
587:         match l with
588:         | [] => Some []
589:         | i :: l' =>
590:             match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with
591:             | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
592:             | _, _ => None
593:             end
594:         end) l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
595:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
596:       intros tbl' Hagree.
597:       destruct fuel; simpl.
598:       { discriminate. }
599:       rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
600:       assert (Hts' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
601:         match l0 with
602:         | [] => Some []
603:         | i :: l'0 =>
604:             match unfold tbl' fuel i, go l'0 with
605:             | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
606:             | _, _ => None
607:             end
608:         end) l = Some ts).
609:       { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hagree.
610:         induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
611:         destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
612:         destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
613:             match l0 with
614:             | [] => Some []
615:             | i0 :: l'0 =>
616:                 match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with
617:                 | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
618:                 | _, _ => None
619:                 end
620:             end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
621:         inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts.
622:         rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi tbl' Hagree).
623:         rewrite IHl; auto.
624:       }
625:       rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
626:     + (* nCase *)
627:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
628:       destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
629:       destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) :=
630:         match l with
631:         | [] => Some []
632:         | i :: l' =>
633:             match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with
634:             | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts)
635:             | _, _ => None
636:             end
637:         end) l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
638:       inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
639:       intros tbl' Hagree.
640:       destruct fuel; simpl.
641:       { discriminate. }
642:       rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
643:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc tbl' Hagree).
644:       rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo tbl' Hagree).
645:       assert (HBs' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
646:         match l0 with
647:         | [] => Some []
648:         | i :: l'0 =>
649:             match unfold tbl' fuel i, go l'0 with
650:             | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
651:             | _, _ => None
652:             end
653:         end) l = Some Bs).
654:       { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hagree.
655:         induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
656:         destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
657:         destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) :=
658:             match l0 with
659:             | [] => Some []
660:             | i0 :: l'0 =>
661:                 match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with
662:                 | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0)
663:                 | _, _ => None
664:                 end
665:             end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
666:         inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs.
667:         rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi tbl' Hagree).
668:         rewrite IHl; auto.
669:       }
670:       rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
671: Qed.

673: (** ** Theorems *)
674: 
675: (** *** share_size_le: DAG size ≤ tree size *)
676: 
677: Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl,
678:   length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
679: Proof.
680:   induction t; simpl; intros tbl.
681:   - apply intern_length_succ.
682:   - apply intern_length_succ.
683:   - (* tPi *)
684:     destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
685:     destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
686:     pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
687:     pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
688:     unfold intern; simpl.
689:     destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
690:     rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
691:   - (* tLam *)
692:     destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
693:     destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
694:     pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
695:     pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
696:     unfold intern; simpl.
697:     destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
698:     rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
699:   - (* tApp *)
700:     destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1.
701:     destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2.
702:     pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
703:     pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
704:     unfold intern; simpl.
705:     destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp f a)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
706:     rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
707:   - (* tFix *)
708:     destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
709:     destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
710:     pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
711:     pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
712:     unfold intern; simpl.
713:     destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
714:     rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
715:   - apply intern_length_succ.
716:   - (* tRoll *)
717:     set (go := fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
718:       match ts with
719:       | [] => (acc, [])
720:       | t0 :: rest =>
721:           let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
722:           let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
723:           (acc2, idx :: idxs)
724:       end).
725:     destruct (go l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
726:     assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= (fix sum (ts : list tm) : nat :=
727:       match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum rest end) l + length tbl).
728:     { subst go.
729:       induction l as [|t0 l' IHl] in tbl, Ego |- *; simpl in *.
730:       - inversion Ego; lia.
731:       - destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh.
732:         simpl in Ego.
733:         destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
734:             match ts with
735:             | [] => (acc, [])
736:             | t1 :: rest0 =>
737:                 let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc in
738:                 let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in
739:                 (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
740:             end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
741:         inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
742:         pose proof (IHt0 tbl) as IHt0'. rewrite Esh in IHt0'.
743:         pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'.
744:         simpl; lia.
745:     }
746:     unfold intern; simpl.
747:     destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia.
748:     rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
749:   - (* tCase *)
750:     destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1.
751:     destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
752:     set (go := fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
753:       match ts with
754:       | [] => (acc, [])
755:       | t0 :: rest =>
756:           let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in
757:           let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in
758:           (acc2, idx :: idxs)
759:       end).
760:     destruct (go l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
761:     pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
762:     pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
763:     assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= (fix sum (ts : list tm) : nat :=
764:       match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum rest end) l + length tbl2).
765:     { subst go.
766:       induction l as [|t0 l' IHl] in tbl2, Ego |- *; simpl in *.
767:       - inversion Ego; lia.
768:       - destruct (share t0 tbl2) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh.
769:         simpl in Ego.
770:         destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
771:             match ts with
772:             | [] => (acc, [])
773:             | t1 :: rest0 =>
774:                 let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc in
775:                 let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in
776:                 (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0)
777:             end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
778:         inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
779:         pose proof (IHt0 tbl2) as IHt0'. rewrite Esh in IHt0'.
780:         pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'.
781:         simpl; lia.
782:     }
783:     unfold intern; simpl.
784:     destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia.
785:     rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
786: Qed.
787: 
788: Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
789:   length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
790: Proof.
791:   intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia.
792: Qed.
793: 
794: Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
795:   length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
796: Proof.
797:   intro H. pose proof (share_size_le) as Hpos. auto.
798: Qed.
799: 
800: (** *** unfold_share: round-trip correctness *)
801: 
802: Lemma share_child_lt : forall t tbl,
803:   (forall i n, nth_error tbl i = Some n ->
804:     match n with
805:     | nPi a b => a < i /\ b < i
806:     | nLam a ti => a < i /\ ti < i
807:     | nApp f a => f < i /\ a < i
808:     | nFix a ti => a < i /\ ti < i
809:     | nRoll _ _ args => Forall (fun j => j < i) args
810:     | nCase _ s m brs => s < i /\ m < i /\ Forall (fun j => j < i) brs
811:     | _ => True
812:     end) ->
813:   let '(tbl', idx) := share t tbl in
814:   (forall i, i < length tbl -> nth_error tbl' i = nth_error tbl i) /\
815:   (forall i n, nth_error tbl' i = Some n ->
816:     match n with
817:     | nPi a b => a < i /\ b < i
818:     | nLam a ti => a < i /\ ti < i
819:     | nApp f a => f < i /\ a < i
820:     | nFix a ti => a < i /\ ti < i
821:     | nRoll _ _ args => Forall (fun j => j < i) args
822:     | nCase _ s m brs => s < i /\ m < i /\ Forall (fun j => j < i) brs
823:     | _ => True
824:     end) /\
825:   unfold tbl' (S idx) idx = Some t.
826: Proof.
827:   induction t; simpl; intros tbl Hwf.
828:   - (* tVar *)
829:     destruct (intern (nVar n) tbl) as [tbl' idx] eqn:E.
830:     split; [|split].
831:     + intros i Hi. erewrite intern_preserve; eauto.
832:     + intros i n'. unfold intern in E.
833:       destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nVar n)) tbl 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E; subst; clear E.
834:       * simpl. apply Hwf.
835:       * simpl. intros Hnth.
836:         apply nth_error_app_inv in Hnth.
837:         destruct Hnth as [Hnth|[Hlen Hnth]].
838:         { apply Hwf with (i := i) (n := n'). exact Hnth. }
839:         { subst. simpl in Hnth. inversion Hnth. subst. exact I. }
840:     + subst. simpl.
841:       unfold intern in E.
842:       destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nVar n)) tbl 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E; subst; clear E.
843:       * (* found *)
844:         unfold unfold. simpl.
845:         rewrite intern_nth_error. simpl. reflexivity.
846:       * (* not found *)
847:         simpl.
848:         rewrite intern_nth_error. simpl. reflexivity.
849:   - (* tSort *)
850:     destruct (intern (nSort n) tbl) as [tbl' idx] eqn:E.
851:     split; [|split].
852:     + intros i Hi. erewrite intern_preserve; eauto.
853:     + intros i n'. unfold intern in E.
854:       destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nSort n)) tbl 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E; subst; clear E.
855:       * simpl. apply Hwf.
856:       * simpl. intros Hnth.
857:         apply nth_error_app_inv in Hnth.
858:         destruct Hnth as [Hnth|[Hlen Hnth]].
859:         { apply Hwf with (i := i) (n := n'). exact Hnth. }
860:         { subst. simpl in Hnth. inversion Hnth. subst. exact I. }
861:     + subst. simpl.
862:       unfold intern in E.
863:       destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nSort n)) tbl 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E; subst; clear E.
864:       * unfold unfold. simpl. rewrite intern_nth_error. simpl. reflexivity.
865:       * simpl. rewrite intern_nth_error. simpl. reflexivity.
866:   - (* tPi *)
867:     destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
868:     destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
869:     destruct (IHt1 tbl Hwf) as [Hpres1 [Hwf1 Hunfold1]].
870:     rewrite E1 in Hpres1, Hwf1, Hunfold1.
871:     destruct (IHt2 tbl1 Hwf1) as [Hpres2 [Hwf2 Hunfold2]].
872:     rewrite E2 in Hpres2, Hwf2, Hunfold2.
873:     destruct (intern (nPi a b) tbl2) as [tbl_res idx] eqn:E3.
874:     split; [|split].
875:     + intros i Hi.
876:       rewrite (Hpres1 i Hi).
877:       erewrite intern_preserve; [|apply Hpres2; assumption].
878:       apply Hpres2; assumption.
879:     + intros i n'. unfold intern in E3.
880:       destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E3; subst; clear E3.
881:       * simpl. apply Hwf2.
882:       * simpl. intros Hnth.
883:         apply nth_error_app_inv in Hnth.
884:         destruct Hnth as [Hnth|[Hlen Hnth]].
885:         { apply Hwf2 with (i := i) (n := n'). exact Hnth. }
886:         { subst. simpl in Hnth. inversion Hnth. subst. clear Hnth.
887:           split; [|split]; auto.
888:           (* Need: a < length tbl2 and b < length tbl2 *)
889:           (* Since a and b were produced by share into tbl (and tbl1), they are < length tbl1 <= length tbl2 *)
890:           (* But we also need a < length tbl2 and b < length tbl2 which holds since tbl2 extends tbl1 *)
891:           (* Actually we just need the indices to be valid, not the < relationship. *) }
892:     + (* The key unfold proof *)
893:       subst. simpl.
894:       (* We need: unfold tbl_res (S idx) idx = Some (tPi t1 t2) *)
895:       remember (fun fuel => unfold tbl_res fuel idx) as UF.
896:       assert (Hidx_lt_len : idx < length tbl_res).

898:       destruct (length tbl_res) eqn:Hlen.

900:       simpl.
901:       rewrite intern_nth_error. simpl.

903:          unfold tbl_res idx a = Some t1
904:          unfold tbl_res idx b = Some t2
905:       *)
906:       assert (Ha_lt_idx : a < idx).
907:       { (* This follows from the intern: either found or appended *)
908:         unfold intern in E3.
909:         destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) eqn:Hf; inversion E3; subst.
910:         - (* found: idx is position in tbl2 where (nPi a b) exists *)
911:           (* Since tbl2 satisfies Hwf2, we know a < idx *)
912:           simpl.
913:           assert (Hnth_tbl2 : nth_error tbl2 idx = Some (nPi a b)).
914:           { (* from find_index property, need to prove this *)
915:             clear -Hf n.
916:             induction tbl2 as [|h t IH] in idx, Hf |- *; simpl in *; try discriminate.
917:             destruct (node_eqb (nPi a b) h) eqn:Heq.
918:             - inv Hf. simpl. rewrite Heq. reflexivity.
919:             - apply IH. exact Hf.
920:           }
921:           apply Hwf2 in Hnth_tbl2. destruct Hnth_tbl2 as [Ha_lt _]. exact Ha_lt.
922:         - (* not found: idx = length tbl2 *)
923:           subst.
924:           (* Need: a < length tbl2 *)
925:           admit.
926:       }
927:       assert (Hb_lt_idx : b < idx).
928:       { (* Similar *)
929:         admit.
930:       }
931:       assert (Ha_unfold : unfold tbl_res idx a = Some t1).
932:       { apply unfold_success_fuel with (fuel := S a).

938:             (* Since a < idx and tbl_res extends tbl1, for j < length tbl1, nth tbl_res j = nth tbl1 j *)
939:             admit.

941:       }
942:       rewrite Ha_unfold.

944:       admit.

Lemma intern_length_succ : forall n tbl,
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= S (length tbl).
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; try lia.
  rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
Qed.
