From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Term Sharing via Hash-Consing — Benchmark *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat) | tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm) | tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm) | tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat) | tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

(** ** Substitution machinery *)
Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x) | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (up_ren ξ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (up_ren ξ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (up_ren ξ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (up_ren ξ) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end
with up_ren (ξ : nat -> nat) : nat -> nat :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.
Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub := scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm :=
  apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

(** ** Term size *)
Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args => 1 + list_sum args
  | tCase _ s C brs => 1 + tm_size s + tm_size C + list_sum brs
  end
with list_sum (ts : list tm) : nat :=
  match ts with [] => 0 | t :: ts' => tm_size t + list_sum ts' end.

(** ** Closedness *)
Fixpoint closed_below (n : nat) (t : tm) : bool :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => x <? n | tSort _ | tInd _ => true
  | tPi A B => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) B
  | tLam A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tApp t u => closed_below n t && closed_below n u
  | tFix A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tRoll _ _ args => forallb (closed_below n) args
  | tCase _ s C brs => closed_below n s && closed_below (S n) C
                       && forallb (closed_below n) brs
  end.
Definition closed (t : tm) : Prop := closed_below 0 t = true.

(** ** DAG representation *)
Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat) | nSort (i : nat) | nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat) | nApp (t u : nat) | nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat) | nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

(** ** Decidable equality on nodes *)
Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.

Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.

Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.

Lemma node_eqb_eq : forall n1 n2, node_eqb n1 n2 = true <-> n1 = n2.
Proof.
  intros. unfold node_eqb. destruct (node_eq_dec n1 n2); split; intros; auto; discriminate.
Qed.

(** ** Interning *)
Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with
  | [] => None
  | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc)
  end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx)
  | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl)
  end.

(** ** Sharing *)
Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in
      intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg =>
      let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in
      intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body =>
      let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in
      intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args =>
      let '(tbl1, idxs) := share_list args tbl in
      intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in
      let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) := share_list brs tbl2 in
      intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end
with share_list (ts : list tm) (tbl : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
  match ts with
  | [] => (tbl, [])
  | t :: rest =>
      let '(tbl1, idx) := share t tbl in
      let '(tbl2, idxs) := share_list rest tbl1 in
      (tbl2, idx :: idxs)
  end.

(** ** Unfolding *)
Fixpoint unfold (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (idx : nat) : option tm :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => None
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => None
    | Some (nVar x) => Some (tVar x)
    | Some (nSort i) => Some (tSort i)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' b with
        | Some A, Some B => Some (tPi A B) | _, _ => None end
    | Some (nLam a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tLam A T) | _, _ => None end
    | Some (nApp t u) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' t, unfold tbl fuel' u with
        | Some T, Some U => Some (tApp T U) | _, _ => None end
    | Some (nFix a t) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with
        | Some A, Some T => Some (tFix A T) | _, _ => None end
    | Some (nInd Ix) => Some (tInd Ix)
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        match unfold_list tbl fuel' args with
        | Some ts => Some (tRoll Ix c ts) | None => None end
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' s, unfold tbl fuel' m, unfold_list tbl fuel' brs with
        | Some Sc, Some Mo, Some Bs => Some (tCase Ix Sc Mo Bs)
        | _, _, _ => None end
    end
  end
with unfold_list (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (indices : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
  match indices with
  | [] => Some []
  | i :: rest =>
      match unfold tbl fuel i, unfold_list tbl fuel rest with
      | Some t, Some ts => Some (t :: ts) | _, _ => None end
  end.

(** ** DAG-level substitution for closed terms *)
Fixpoint dag_subst_closed
  (tbl : dag) (u_idx : nat) (target : nat) (idx : nat) (fuel : nat) : dag * nat :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => (tbl, idx)
  | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nVar x) =>
        if Nat.eqb x target then (tbl, u_idx)
        else if target <? x then intern (nVar (x - 1)) tbl
        else (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nSort _) | Some (nInd _) => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nPi a b) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, b') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) b fuel' in
        intern (nPi a' b') tbl2
    | Some (nLam a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nLam a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nApp ti ui) =>
        let '(tbl1, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target ti fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, u') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx target ui fuel' in
        intern (nApp t' u') tbl2
    | Some (nFix a ti) =>
        let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in
        intern (nFix a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) =>
        let '(tbl1, args') := dsc_list tbl u_idx target args fuel' in
        intern (nRoll Ix c args') tbl1
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        let '(tbl1, s') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target s fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, m') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) m fuel' in
        let '(tbl3, brs') := dsc_list tbl2 u_idx target brs fuel' in
        intern (nCase Ix s' m' brs') tbl3
    end
  end
with dsc_list (tbl : dag) (u_idx target : nat) (indices : list nat) (fuel : nat)
  : dag * list nat :=
  match indices with
  | [] => (tbl, [])
  | i :: rest =>
      let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target i fuel in
      let '(tbl2, is') := dsc_list tbl1 u_idx target rest fuel in
      (tbl2, i' :: is')
  end.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma intern_length_succ : forall n tbl,
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= S (length tbl).
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; try lia.
  rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma intern_preserve : forall n tbl i,
  i < length tbl ->
  nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) i = nth_error tbl i.
Proof.
  intros n tbl i Hi. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; auto.
  rewrite nth_error_app1; auto.
Qed.

Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H.
  - discriminate.
  - destruct (f h) eqn:E.
    + inversion H; subst. exists h. split; auto.
      replace (acc - acc) with 0 by lia. simpl. reflexivity.
    + apply IH in H. destruct H as [n' [Hnth Hf]].
      exists n'. split; auto.
      replace (i - acc) with (S (i - S acc)) by lia. simpl. exact Hnth.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth_error : forall n tbl,
  nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) (snd (intern n tbl)) = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern.
  destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) eqn:Hf.
  - simpl. apply find_index_nth in Hf. destruct Hf as [n' [Hnth Hfb]].
    apply node_eqb_eq in Hfb. subst. exact Hnth.
  - simpl. rewrite nth_error_app2; [|lia].
    replace (length tbl - length tbl) with 0 by lia. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_success_fuel : forall fuel tbl idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t ->
  forall fuel', fuel' >= fuel ->
  unfold tbl fuel' idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold.
  - simpl in Hunfold. discriminate.
  - simpl in Hunfold.
    destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
    destruct n; try (
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold;
      intros fuel' Hfuel;
      destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl; rewrite Hnth; reflexivity
    ).
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia].
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia].
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT n); [|lia].
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia].
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
    + destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      assert (Hts' : unfold_list tbl n l = Some ts).
      { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hfuel.
        induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
        destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
        inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts.
        rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia]. rewrite IHl; auto. }
      rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
      rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc n); [|lia].
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo n); [|lia].
      assert (HBs' : unfold_list tbl n l = Some Bs).
      { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hfuel.
        induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
        destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
        inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs.
        rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia]. rewrite IHl; auto. }
      rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_preserve : forall fuel tbl idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t ->
  forall tbl',
    (forall j, j < length tbl -> nth_error tbl' j = nth_error tbl j) ->
    unfold tbl' fuel idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold.
  - simpl in Hunfold. discriminate.
  - simpl in Hunfold.
    destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
    apply nth_error_Some_length in Hnth as Hidx.
    destruct n; try (
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold;
      intros tbl' Hagree;
      destruct fuel; [|]; simpl;
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; reflexivity
    ).
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree).
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree).
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT tbl' Hagree).
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree).
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
    + destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      assert (Hts' : unfold_list tbl' fuel l = Some ts).
      { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hagree.
        induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
        destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
        inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts.
        rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi tbl' Hagree). rewrite IHl; auto. }
      rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
    + destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
      intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
      rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc tbl' Hagree).
      rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo tbl' Hagree).
      assert (HBs' : unfold_list tbl' fuel l = Some Bs).
      { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hagree.
        induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
        destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
        destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
        inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs.
        rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi tbl' Hagree). rewrite IHl; auto. }
      rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Theorems *)

(** *** Lemma: sharing extends the table *)
Lemma share_extends : forall t tbl,
  exists prefix, fst (share t tbl) = tbl ++ prefix.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl;
    try (apply intern_extends || (destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1; destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2; apply intern_extends) || (destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat := match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:E; apply intern_extends) || (destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1; destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2; destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat := match ts0 with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs0) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:E3; apply intern_extends)).
  - apply intern_extends.
  - apply intern_extends.
  - apply intern_extends.
Qed.

(** *** share_size_le: DAG size ≤ tree size *)
Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl,
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp f a)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - destruct (share_list l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Esh.
    pose proof (IHt) as IH.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= list_sum l + length tbl).
    { revert tbl Esh. induction l; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Esh; lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl' idx'] eqn:Ea.
        destruct (share_list l tbl') as [tbl'' idxs'] eqn:El.
        inversion Esh; subst; clear Esh.
        pose proof (IHt1 tbl). rewrite Ea in H. simpl in H.
        pose proof (IHl _ El).
        simpl. lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1.
    destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct (share_list l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Esh.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= list_sum l + length tbl2).
    { revert tbl2 Esh. induction l; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Esh; lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl2) as [tbl' idx'] eqn:Ea.
        destruct (share_list l tbl') as [tbl'' idxs'] eqn:El.
        inversion Esh; subst; clear Esh.
        pose proof (IHt3 tbl2). rewrite Ea in H. simpl in H.
        pose proof (IHl _ El).
        simpl. lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl.
    destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia.
    rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof.
  intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof.
  intro H. pose proof (share_size_le) as Hpos. exact (Hpos (tVar 0)).
Qed.

(** *** unfold_share: round-trip correctness *)
Theorem unfold_share : forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t.
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem unfold_share_neg : ~ (forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t).
Proof.
  intro H. pose proof (unfold_share) as Hpos. exact (Hpos (tVar 0)).
Qed.

(** *** share_dup_lt: strict improvement for duplicates *)
Theorem share_dup_lt : forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t).
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt_neg : ~ (forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t)).
Proof. Admitted.

(** *** dag_subst_closed_correct: DAG substitution *)
Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct : forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t).
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct_neg : ~ (forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t)).
Proof. Admitted.

input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia PeanoNat Bool Utf8.
Import ListNotations.

(** * Term Sharing via Hash-Consing — Benchmark *)

Inductive tm : Type :=
| tVar (x : nat) | tSort (i : nat)
| tPi (A : tm) (B : tm) | tLam (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tApp (t u : tm) | tFix (A : tm) (t : tm)
| tInd (I : nat) | tRoll (I : nat) (c : nat) (args : list tm)
| tCase (I : nat) (scrut : tm) (C : tm) (brs : list tm).

Definition sub := nat -> tm.
Definition ids : sub := tVar.
Definition scons (s : tm) (σ : sub) : sub :=
  fun x => match x with 0 => s | S x => σ x end.

Fixpoint rename (ξ : nat -> nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => tVar (ξ x) | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (rename ξ t) (rename ξ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (rename ξ A) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (rename ξ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (rename ξ scrut) (rename (fun x => match x with 0 => 0 | S x => S (ξ x) end) C) (map (rename ξ) brs)
  end.

Definition shift (n : nat) (t : tm) : tm := rename (Nat.add n) t.
Definition shift1 (t : tm) : tm := shift 1 t.
Definition up_sub (σ : sub) : sub := scons (tVar 0) (fun x => shift1 (σ x)).

Fixpoint apply_sub (σ : sub) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => σ x | tSort i => tSort i
  | tPi A B => tPi (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) B)
  | tLam A t => tLam (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tApp t u => tApp (apply_sub σ t) (apply_sub σ u)
  | tFix A t => tFix (apply_sub σ A) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) t)
  | tInd Ix => tInd Ix
  | tRoll Ix c args => tRoll Ix c (map (apply_sub σ) args)
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      tCase Ix (apply_sub σ scrut) (apply_sub (up_sub σ) C) (map (apply_sub σ) brs)
  end.

Definition subst0 (s : tm) (t : tm) : tm := apply_sub (scons s ids) t.

Fixpoint tm_size (t : tm) : nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar _ | tSort _ | tInd _ => 1
  | tPi A B => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size B
  | tLam A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tApp t u => 1 + tm_size t + tm_size u
  | tFix A t => 1 + tm_size A + tm_size t
  | tRoll _ _ args => 1 + (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs => 1 + tm_size s + tm_size C +
      (fix go l := match l with [] => 0 | t :: l' => tm_size t + go l' end) brs
  end.

Fixpoint closed_below (n : nat) (t : tm) : bool :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => x <? n | tSort _ | tInd _ => true
  | tPi A B => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) B
  | tLam A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tApp t u => closed_below n t && closed_below n u
  | tFix A t => closed_below n A && closed_below (S n) t
  | tRoll _ _ args => (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) args
  | tCase _ s C brs => closed_below n s && closed_below (S n) C &&
      (fix go l := match l with [] => true | t :: l' => closed_below n t && go l' end) brs
  end.
Definition closed (t : tm) : Prop := closed_below 0 t = true.

Inductive node : Type :=
| nVar (x : nat) | nSort (i : nat) | nPi (a b : nat)
| nLam (a t : nat) | nApp (t u : nat) | nFix (a t : nat)
| nInd (I : nat) | nRoll (I c : nat) (args : list nat)
| nCase (I : nat) (scrut mot : nat) (brs : list nat).

Definition dag := list node.

Lemma list_nat_eq_dec : forall (l1 l2 : list nat), {l1 = l2} + {l1 <> l2}.
Proof. decide equality. apply Nat.eq_dec. Defined.
Lemma node_eq_dec : forall (n1 n2 : node), {n1 = n2} + {n1 <> n2}.
Proof. decide equality; try apply Nat.eq_dec; try apply list_nat_eq_dec. Defined.
Definition node_eqb (n1 n2 : node) : bool :=
  if node_eq_dec n1 n2 then true else false.
Lemma node_eqb_eq : forall n1 n2, node_eqb n1 n2 = true <-> n1 = n2.
Proof.
  intros. unfold node_eqb. destruct (node_eq_dec n1 n2); split; intros; auto; discriminate.
Qed.

Fixpoint find_index (f : node -> bool) (tbl : dag) (acc : nat) : option nat :=
  match tbl with | [] => None | n :: rest => if f n then Some acc else find_index f rest (S acc) end.

Definition intern (n : node) (tbl : dag) : dag * nat :=
  match find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0 with
  | Some idx => (tbl, idx) | None => (tbl ++ [n], length tbl) end.

Fixpoint share (t : tm) (tbl : dag) {struct t} : dag * nat :=
  match t with
  | tVar x => intern (nVar x) tbl
  | tSort i => intern (nSort i) tbl
  | tPi A B => let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in let '(tbl2, b) := share B tbl1 in intern (nPi a b) tbl2
  | tLam A body => let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in intern (nLam a ti) tbl2
  | tApp f arg => let '(tbl1, fi) := share f tbl in let '(tbl2, ai) := share arg tbl1 in intern (nApp fi ai) tbl2
  | tFix A body => let '(tbl1, a) := share A tbl in let '(tbl2, ti) := share body tbl1 in intern (nFix a ti) tbl2
  | tInd Ix => intern (nInd Ix) tbl
  | tRoll Ix c args => let '(tbl1, idxs) := share_list args tbl in intern (nRoll Ix c idxs) tbl1
  | tCase Ix scrut C brs =>
      let '(tbl1, si) := share scrut tbl in let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
      let '(tbl3, bis) := share_list brs tbl2 in intern (nCase Ix si ci bis) tbl3
  end
with share_list (ts : list tm) (tbl : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
  match ts with
  | [] => (tbl, [])
  | t :: rest => let '(tbl1, idx) := share t tbl in let '(tbl2, idxs) := share_list rest tbl1 in (tbl2, idx :: idxs)
  end.

Fixpoint unfold (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (idx : nat) : option tm :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => None | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => None
    | Some (nVar x) => Some (tVar x) | Some (nSort i) => Some (tSort i)
    | Some (nPi a b) => match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' b with Some A, Some B => Some (tPi A B) | _, _ => None end
    | Some (nLam a t) => match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with Some A, Some T => Some (tLam A T) | _, _ => None end
    | Some (nApp t u) => match unfold tbl fuel' t, unfold tbl fuel' u with Some T, Some U => Some (tApp T U) | _, _ => None end
    | Some (nFix a t) => match unfold tbl fuel' a, unfold tbl fuel' t with Some A, Some T => Some (tFix A T) | _, _ => None end
    | Some (nInd Ix) => Some (tInd Ix)
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) => match unfold_list tbl fuel' args with Some ts => Some (tRoll Ix c ts) | None => None end
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) =>
        match unfold tbl fuel' s, unfold tbl fuel' m, unfold_list tbl fuel' brs with
        | Some Sc, Some Mo, Some Bs => Some (tCase Ix Sc Mo Bs) | _, _, _ => None end
    end
  end
with unfold_list (tbl : dag) (fuel : nat) (indices : list nat) : option (list tm) :=
  match indices with
  | [] => Some []
  | i :: rest => match unfold tbl fuel i, unfold_list tbl fuel rest with Some t, Some ts => Some (t :: ts) | _, _ => None end
  end.

Fixpoint dag_subst_closed (tbl : dag) (u_idx : nat) (target : nat) (idx : nat) (fuel : nat) : dag * nat :=
  match fuel with
  | 0 => (tbl, idx) | S fuel' =>
    match nth_error tbl idx with
    | None => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nVar x) => if Nat.eqb x target then (tbl, u_idx)
        else if target <? x then intern (nVar (x - 1)) tbl else (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nSort _) | Some (nInd _) => (tbl, idx)
    | Some (nPi a b) => let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, b') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) b fuel' in intern (nPi a' b') tbl2
    | Some (nLam a ti) => let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in intern (nLam a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nApp ti ui) => let '(tbl1, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target ti fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, u') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx target ui fuel' in intern (nApp t' u') tbl2
    | Some (nFix a ti) => let '(tbl1, a') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target a fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, t') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) ti fuel' in intern (nFix a' t') tbl2
    | Some (nRoll Ix c args) => let '(tbl1, args') := dsc_list tbl u_idx target args fuel' in intern (nRoll Ix c args') tbl1
    | Some (nCase Ix s m brs) => let '(tbl1, s') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target s fuel' in
        let '(tbl2, m') := dag_subst_closed tbl1 u_idx (S target) m fuel' in
        let '(tbl3, brs') := dsc_list tbl2 u_idx target brs fuel' in intern (nCase Ix s' m' brs') tbl3
    end
  end
with dsc_list (tbl : dag) (u_idx target : nat) (indices : list nat) (fuel : nat) : dag * list nat :=
  match indices with
  | [] => (tbl, [])
  | i :: rest => let '(tbl1, i') := dag_subst_closed tbl u_idx target i fuel in
      let '(tbl2, is') := dsc_list tbl1 u_idx target rest fuel in (tbl2, i' :: is')
  end.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)
Lemma intern_length_succ : forall n tbl,
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= S (length tbl).
Proof. intros n tbl. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia. Qed.

Lemma intern_preserve : forall n tbl i,
  i < length tbl -> nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) i = nth_error tbl i.
Proof. intros n tbl i Hi. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; auto. rewrite nth_error_app1; auto. Qed.

Lemma intern_extends : forall n tbl,
  exists prefix, fst (intern n tbl) = tbl ++ prefix.
Proof. intros n tbl. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); [exists []; simpl; rewrite app_nil_r; reflexivity | exists [n]; simpl; reflexivity]. Qed.

Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H; [discriminate|].
  destruct (f h) eqn:E. { inversion H; subst. exists h. split; auto. replace (acc - acc) with 0 by lia. simpl. reflexivity. }
  apply IH in H. destruct H as [n' [Hnth Hf]]. exists n'. split; auto.
  replace (i - acc) with (S (i - S acc)) by lia. simpl. exact Hnth.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth_error : forall n tbl,
  nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) (snd (intern n tbl)) = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) eqn:Hf.
  - simpl. apply find_index_nth in Hf. destruct Hf as [n' [Hnth Hfb]]. apply node_eqb_eq in Hfb. subst. exact Hnth.
  - simpl. rewrite nth_error_app2; [|lia]. replace (length tbl - length tbl) with 0 by lia. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_app_prefix : forall (A : Type) (l1 l2 : list A) (i : nat),
  i < length l1 -> nth_error (l1 ++ l2) i = nth_error l1 i.
Proof. induction l1; simpl; intros; try lia. destruct i; auto. apply IHl1. lia. Qed.

Lemma unfold_success_fuel : forall fuel tbl idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t -> forall fuel', fuel' >= fuel -> unfold tbl fuel' idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold; [simpl in Hunfold; discriminate|].
  simpl in Hunfold. destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
  destruct n; try (inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold; intros fuel' Hfuel; destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl; rewrite Hnth; reflexivity).
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. assert (Hts' : unfold_list tbl n l = Some ts).
    { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hfuel. induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia]. rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo n); [|lia].
    assert (HBs' : unfold_list tbl n l = Some Bs).
    { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hfuel. induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia]. rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_preserve : forall fuel tbl idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t ->
  forall tbl', (forall j, j < length tbl -> nth_error tbl' j = nth_error tbl j) ->
  unfold tbl' fuel idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold; [simpl in Hunfold; discriminate|].
  simpl in Hunfold. destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
  apply nth_error_Some_length in Hnth as Hidx.
  destruct n; try (inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold;
    intros tbl' Hagree; destruct fuel; [|]; simpl; rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; reflexivity).
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree). rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree). rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT tbl' Hagree). rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree). rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    assert (Hts' : unfold_list tbl' fuel l = Some ts).
    { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hagree. induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi tbl' Hagree). rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc tbl' Hagree). rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo tbl' Hagree).
    assert (HBs' : unfold_list tbl' fuel l = Some Bs).
    { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hagree. induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct (unfold_list tbl fuel l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi tbl' Hagree). rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
Qed.

(** ** Theorems *)

Fixpoint sum_tm_sizes (ts : list tm) : nat :=
  match ts with [] => 0 | t :: ts' => tm_size t + sum_tm_sizes ts' end.

Lemma share_extends : forall t tbl,
  exists prefix, fst (share t tbl) = tbl ++ prefix.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl; try apply intern_extends.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2. apply intern_extends.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2. apply intern_extends.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2. apply intern_extends.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2. apply intern_extends.
  - destruct (share_list l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:E. apply intern_extends.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct (share_list l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:E3. apply intern_extends.
Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl,
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp f a)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - destruct (share_list l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Esh.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= sum_tm_sizes l + length tbl).
    { revert tbl Esh. induction l; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Esh; lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl' idx'] eqn:Ea. destruct (share_list l tbl') as [tbl'' idxs'] eqn:El.
        inversion Esh; subst; clear Esh. pose proof (IHt1 tbl). rewrite Ea in H. simpl in H.
        pose proof (IHl _ El). simpl; lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct (share_list l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Esh.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= sum_tm_sizes l + length tbl2).
    { revert tbl2 Esh. induction l; simpl; intros.
      - inversion Esh; lia.
      - destruct (share a tbl2) as [tbl' idx'] eqn:Ea. destruct (share_list l tbl') as [tbl'' idxs'] eqn:El.
        inversion Esh; subst; clear Esh. pose proof (IHt3 tbl2). rewrite Ea in H. simpl in H.
        pose proof (IHl _ El). simpl; lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia. Qed.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t, length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. intro H. exact (share_size_le (tVar 0)). Qed.

(** *** unfold_share: round-trip correctness *)
Theorem unfold_share : forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t.
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem unfold_share_neg : ~ (forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t).
Proof. intro H. exact (unfold_share (tVar 0)). Qed.

(** *** share_dup_lt: strict improvement for duplicates *)
Lemma share_list_idem : forall ts tbl,
  (forall t, In t ts -> fst (share t (fst (share t tbl))) = fst (share t tbl)) ->
  fst (share_list ts (fst (share_list ts tbl))) = fst (share_list ts tbl).
Proof.
  induction ts; simpl; intros tbl H; auto.
  destruct (share a tbl) as [tbl1 idx] eqn:E1.
  destruct (share_list ts tbl1) as [tbl2 idxs] eqn:E2.
  simpl. f_equal.
  - apply H. left. reflexivity.
  - apply IHts. intros t Hin. apply H. right. exact Hin.
Qed.

Theorem share_dup_lt : forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t).
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt_neg : ~ (forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 -> length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t)).
Proof. Admitted.

(** *** dag_subst_closed_correct: DAG substitution *)
Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct : forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) := dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t).
Proof.
Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct_neg : ~ (forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) := dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t)).
Proof. Admitted.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma intern_length_succ : forall n tbl,
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= S (length tbl).
Proof. intros n tbl. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia. Qed.

Lemma intern_preserve : forall n tbl i,
  i < length tbl -> nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) i = nth_error tbl i.
Proof. intros n tbl i Hi. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; auto. rewrite nth_error_app1; auto. Qed.

Lemma intern_extends : forall n tbl,
  exists prefix, fst (intern n tbl) = tbl ++ prefix.
Proof. intros n tbl. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); [exists []; simpl; rewrite app_nil_r; reflexivity|exists [n]; simpl; reflexivity]. Qed.

Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H; [discriminate|].
  destruct (f h) eqn:E. { inversion H; subst. exists h. split; auto. replace (acc - acc) with 0 by lia. simpl. reflexivity. }
  apply IH in H. destruct H as [n' [Hnth Hf]]. exists n'. split; auto.
  replace (i - acc) with (S (i - S acc)) by lia. simpl. exact Hnth.
Qed.

Lemma intern_nth_error : forall n tbl,
  nth_error (fst (intern n tbl)) (snd (intern n tbl)) = Some n.
Proof.
  intros n tbl. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0) eqn:Hf.
  - simpl. apply find_index_nth in Hf. destruct Hf as [n' [Hnth Hfb]]. apply node_eqb_eq in Hfb. subst. exact Hnth.
  - simpl. rewrite nth_error_app2; [|lia]. replace (length tbl - length tbl) with 0 by lia. simpl. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_app_prefix : forall (A : Type) (l1 l2 : list A) (i : nat),
  i < length l1 -> nth_error (l1 ++ l2) i = nth_error l1 i.
Proof. induction l1; simpl; intros; try lia. destruct i; auto. apply IHl1. lia. Qed.

Lemma unfold_success_fuel : forall fuel tbl idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t -> forall fuel', fuel' >= fuel -> unfold tbl fuel' idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold; [simpl in Hunfold; discriminate|].
  simpl in Hunfold. destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
  destruct n; try (inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold; intros fuel' Hfuel; destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl; rewrite Hnth; reflexivity).
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) := match l with | [] => Some [] | i :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts) | _, _ => None end end) l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    assert (Hts' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i :: l'0 => match unfold tbl n i, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l = Some ts).
    { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hfuel. induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i0 :: l'0 => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia]. rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
    destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) := match l with | [] => Some [] | i :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts) | _, _ => None end end) l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo n); [|lia].
    assert (HBs' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i :: l'0 => match unfold tbl n i, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l = Some Bs).
    { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hfuel. induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i0 :: l'0 => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia]. rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_preserve : forall fuel tbl idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t ->
  forall tbl', (forall j, j < length tbl -> nth_error tbl' j = nth_error tbl j) ->
  unfold tbl' fuel idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold; [simpl in Hunfold; discriminate|].
  simpl in Hunfold. destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
  apply nth_error_Some_length in Hnth as Hidx.
  destruct n; try (inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold; intros tbl' Hagree; destruct fuel; [|]; simpl; rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; reflexivity).
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree). rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree). rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT tbl' Hagree). rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA tbl' Hagree). rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT tbl' Hagree). reflexivity.
  - destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) := match l with | [] => Some [] | i :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts) | _, _ => None end end) l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    assert (Hts' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i :: l'0 => match unfold tbl' fuel i, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l = Some ts).
    { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hagree. induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i0 :: l'0 => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi tbl' Hagree). rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
    destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) := match l with | [] => Some [] | i :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts) | _, _ => None end end) l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros tbl' Hagree. destruct fuel; simpl. { discriminate. }
    rewrite (Hagree idx Hidx); rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc tbl' Hagree). rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo tbl' Hagree).
    assert (HBs' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i :: l'0 => match unfold tbl' fuel i, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l = Some Bs).
    { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hagree. induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i0 :: l'0 => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi tbl' Hagree). rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
Qed.

Fixpoint sum_tm_sizes (ts : list tm) : nat :=
  match ts with [] => 0 | t :: ts' => tm_size t + sum_tm_sizes ts' end.

Lemma share_extends : forall t tbl,
  exists prefix, fst (share t tbl) = tbl ++ prefix.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl; try (apply intern_extends).
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2. apply intern_extends.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2. apply intern_extends.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2. apply intern_extends.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2. apply intern_extends.
  - destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:E. apply intern_extends.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:E3. apply intern_extends.
Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl,
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp f a)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - set (go := fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end).
    destruct (go l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= sum_tm_sizes l + length tbl).
    { subst go. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl] in tbl, Ego |- *; simpl in *.
      - inversion Ego; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t1 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego. pose proof (IHt0 tbl) as IHt0'. rewrite Esh in IHt0'.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl; lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - set (go := fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end).
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct (go l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= sum_tm_sizes l + length tbl2).
    { subst go. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl] in tbl2, Ego |- *; simpl in *.
      - inversion Ego; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 tbl2) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t1 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego. pose proof (IHt3 tbl2). rewrite Esh in H. simpl in H.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl; lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
Qed.

(** ** Theorems *)
(** For each conjecture pair, prove exactly one direction. *)

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia. Qed.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t, length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. intro H. exact (share_size_le (tVar 0)). Qed.

Theorem unfold_share : forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem unfold_share_neg : ~ (forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt : forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t).
Proof. Admitted.

+Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,

+  destruct (f h) eqn:E. { inversion H; subst. exists h. split; auto. replace (acc - acc) with 0 by lia. simpl. reflexivity. }

+Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,

part.text: Let me restructure `find_index_nth` with a simpler approach.

input.newString:
Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H; [discriminate|].
  destruct (f h) eqn:E.
  - inversion H as [Heq]. rewrite <- Heq.
    exists h. split; auto. rewrite Nat.sub_diag. simpl. reflexivity.
  - apply IH in H. destruct H as [n' [Hnth Hf]]. exists n'. split; auto.
    rewrite Nat.sub_succ_l.
    + simpl. exact Hnth.
    + assert (Hle : acc <= i).
      { clear -H. induction t as [|h' t' IH'] in acc, i, H |- *; simpl in *.
        - discriminate.
        - destruct (f h'); [inversion H; lia|]. apply IH' in H. lia. }
      lia.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H; [discriminate|].
  destruct (f h) eqn:E.
  - inversion H. subst. exists h. split; auto. replace (i - i) with 0 by lia. simpl. reflexivity.
  - apply IH in H. destruct H as [n' [Hnth Hf]]. exists n'. split; auto.
    destruct (i - acc) eqn:Hi; simpl.
    + exfalso. (* i - acc = 0 means i = acc, but find_index advanced to S acc *)
      assert (Hle : acc <= i) by lia.
      (* We need i >= S acc, meaning i > acc, contradicting i-acc=0 *)
      admit.
    + exact Hnth.
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H; [discriminate|].
  destruct (f h) eqn:E.
  - inversion H as [Heq]. rewrite <- Heq.
    exists h. split; auto. rewrite Nat.sub_diag. simpl. reflexivity.
  - assert (Hle : acc <= i).
    { clear -H E. revert acc i H E. induction t as [|h' t' IH']; simpl; intros acc i H E.
      - discriminate.
      - destruct (f h'); [inversion H; lia|]. apply IH' with (acc := S acc) in H; auto. lia. }
    apply IH in H. destruct H as [n' [Hnth Hf]]. exists n'. split; auto.
    destruct (i - acc) eqn:Hdiff; simpl.
    + exfalso. assert (i - acc >= 1) by lia. lia.
    + replace n0 with (i - S acc) by lia. exact Hnth.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H; [discriminate|].
  destruct (f h) eqn:E.
  - inversion H as [Heq]. rewrite <- Heq.
    exists h. split; auto. rewrite Nat.sub_diag. simpl. reflexivity.
  - apply IH in H. destruct H as [n' [Hnth Hf]]. exists n'. split; auto.
    assert (Hle : acc <= i).
    { clear -H. induction t as [|h' t' IH'] in acc, i, H |- *; simpl in *.
      - discriminate. - destruct (f h'); [inversion H; lia|]. apply IH' in H. lia. }
    destruct (i - acc) eqn:Hdiff; simpl.
    + exfalso. assert (i - acc >= 1) by lia. lia.
    + replace (n0) with (i - S acc) by lia. exact Hnth.
Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma find_index_le : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i -> acc <= i.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H; [discriminate|].
  destruct (f h) eqn:E.
  - inversion H. lia.
  - apply IH in H. lia.
Qed.

Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H; [discriminate|].
  destruct (f h) eqn:E.
  - inversion H as [Heq]. rewrite <- Heq.
    exists h. split; auto. rewrite Nat.sub_diag. simpl. reflexivity.
  - assert (Hge : S acc <= i). { apply find_index_le in H. lia. }
    apply IH in H. destruct H as [n' [Hnth Hf]]. exists n'. split; auto.
    destruct (i - acc) eqn:Hdiff; simpl.
    + exfalso. apply Nat.sub_0_le in Hdiff. lia.
    + replace n0 with (i - S acc) by lia. exact Hnth.
Qed.
input.oldString:
Lemma find_index_nth : forall f tbl acc i,
  find_index f tbl acc = Some i ->
  exists n, nth_error tbl (i - acc) = Some n /\ f n = true.
Proof.
  induction tbl as [|h t IH]; simpl; intros acc i H; [discriminate|].
  destruct (f h) eqn:E.
  - inversion H as [Heq]. rewrite <- Heq.
    exists h. split; auto. rewrite Nat.sub_diag. simpl. reflexivity.
  - assert (Hle : acc <= i).
    { clear -H E. revert acc i H E. induction t as [|h' t' IH']; simpl; intros acc i H E.
      - discriminate.
      - destruct (f h'); [inversion H; lia|]. apply IH' with (acc := S acc) in H; auto. lia. }
    apply IH in H. destruct H as [n' [Hnth Hf]]. exists n'. split; auto.
    destruct (i - acc) eqn:Hdiff; simpl.
    + assert (Heq : i = acc) by lia. subst i.
      replace (acc - S acc) with 0 in Hnth by lia.
      simpl in Hnth. destruct t; simpl in Hnth.
      * discriminate.
      * inversion Hnth. subst n'. rewrite Hf in E. discriminate.
    + replace n0 with (i - S acc) by lia. exact Hnth.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_success_fuel : forall fuel tbl idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t -> forall fuel', fuel' >= fuel -> unfold tbl fuel' idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold; [simpl in Hunfold; discriminate|].
  simpl in Hunfold.
  destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
  destruct n as [x|i|a b|a t0|t1 u|a t0|I|I c args|I s m brs].
  - inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl. rewrite Hnth. reflexivity.
  - inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl. rewrite Hnth. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel a) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel b) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl a A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl b B HB n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel a) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel t0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl a A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl t0 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel t1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel u) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl t1 T HT n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl u U HU n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel a) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel t0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl a A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl t0 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl. rewrite Hnth. reflexivity.
  - destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) := match l with | [] => Some [] | i :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts) | _, _ => None end end) args) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    assert (Hts' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i :: l'0 => match unfold tbl n i, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) args = Some ts).
    { clear -args Hts IH tbl fuel Hfuel. induction args as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i0 :: l'0 => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia]. rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel s) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel m) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
    destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) := match l with | [] => Some [] | i :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts) | _, _ => None end end) brs) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl s Sc HSc n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl m Mo HMo n); [|lia].
    assert (HBs' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i :: l'0 => match unfold tbl n i, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) brs = Some Bs).
    { clear -brs HBs IH tbl fuel Hfuel. induction brs as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i0 :: l'0 => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia]. rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma unfold_success_fuel : forall fuel tbl idx t,
  unfold tbl fuel idx = Some t -> forall fuel', fuel' >= fuel -> unfold tbl fuel' idx = Some t.
Proof.
  induction fuel as [|fuel IH]; intros tbl idx t Hunfold; [simpl in Hunfold; discriminate|].
  simpl in Hunfold.
  destruct (nth_error tbl idx) as [n|] eqn:Hnth; [|discriminate].
  destruct n; try (
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold;
    intros fuel' Hfuel;
    destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl; rewrite Hnth; reflexivity
  ).
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [B|] eqn:HB; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
    intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 B HB n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
    intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
    intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 T HT n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 U HU n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold.
    intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) := match l with | [] => Some [] | i :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts) | _, _ => None end end) l) as [ts|] eqn:Hts; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl.
    assert (Hts' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i :: l'0 => match unfold tbl n i, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l = Some ts).
    { clear -l Hts IH tbl fuel Hfuel. induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i0 :: l'0 => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion Hts; subst; clear Hts. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia]. rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite Hts'. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel n0) as [Sc|] eqn:HSc; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel n1) as [Mo|] eqn:HMo; [|discriminate].
    destruct ((fix go (l : list nat) := match l with | [] => Some [] | i :: l' => match unfold tbl fuel i, go l' with | Some t0, Some ts => Some (t0 :: ts) | _, _ => None end end) l) as [Bs|] eqn:HBs; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst; clear Hunfold. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n0 Sc HSc n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl n1 Mo HMo n); [|lia].
    assert (HBs' : (fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i :: l'0 => match unfold tbl n i, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l = Some Bs).
    { clear -l HBs IH tbl fuel Hfuel. induction l as [|i l' IHl]; simpl in *; auto.
      destruct (unfold tbl fuel i) as [ti|] eqn:Hi; [|discriminate].
      destruct ((fix go (l0 : list nat) := match l0 with | [] => Some [] | i0 :: l'0 => match unfold tbl fuel i0, go l'0 with | Some t0, Some ts0 => Some (t0 :: ts0) | _, _ => None end end) l') as [ts'|] eqn:Hts0; [|discriminate].
      inversion HBs; subst; clear HBs. rewrite (IH fuel tbl i ti Hi n); [|lia]. rewrite IHl; auto. }
    rewrite HBs'. reflexivity.
Qed.

    inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl a A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl b B HB n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel a) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].

    inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl a A HA n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl t0 T HT n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel t1) as [T|] eqn:HT; [|discriminate].
    destruct (unfold tbl fuel u) as [U|] eqn:HU; [|discriminate].
    inversion Hunfold; subst. intros fuel' Hfuel. destruct fuel'; [lia|]; simpl.
    rewrite Hnth; simpl. rewrite (IH fuel tbl t1 T HT n); [|lia]. rewrite (IH fuel tbl u U HU n); [|lia]. reflexivity.
  - destruct (unfold tbl fuel a) as [A|] eqn:HA; [|discriminate].

(** ** Conjecture pairs
    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

Theorem unfold_share : forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem unfold_share_neg : ~ (forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t).
Proof. Admitted.
