(** ** Conjecture pairs
    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

Theorem unfold_share : forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem unfold_share_neg : ~ (forall t,
  let '(tbl, idx) := share t [] in
  unfold tbl (length tbl) idx = Some t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt : forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem share_dup_lt_neg : ~ (forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t)).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct : forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t).
Proof. Admitted.

Theorem dag_subst_closed_correct_neg : ~ (forall t u,
  closed u ->
  let '(tbl_u, idx_u) := share u [] in
  let '(tbl_t, idx_t) := share t tbl_u in
  let '(tbl_res, idx_res) :=
    dag_subst_closed tbl_t idx_u 0 idx_t (length tbl_t) in
  unfold tbl_res (length tbl_res) idx_res = Some (subst0 u t)).
Proof. Admitted.

Lemma intern_length_succ : forall n tbl, length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= S (length tbl).
Proof. intros n tbl. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia. Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl, length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp f a)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - set (go := fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat := match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end).
    destruct (go l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= (fix sum (ts : list tm) : nat := match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum rest end) l + length tbl).
    { subst go. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl] in tbl, Ego |- *; simpl in *.
      - inversion Ego; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 tbl) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat := match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego. pose proof (IHt0 tbl) as IHt0'. rewrite Esh in IHt0'.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl; lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    set (go := fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat := match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end).
    destruct (go l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= (fix sum (ts : list tm) : nat := match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum rest end) l + length tbl2).
    { subst go. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl] in tbl2, Ego |- *; simpl in *.
      - inversion Ego; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 tbl2) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat := match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego. pose proof (IHt3 tbl2) as IH3. rewrite Esh in IH3. simpl in IH3.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl; lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite app_length; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t, length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia. Qed.

input.newString:
Lemma intern_length_succ : forall n tbl,
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= S (length tbl).
Proof. intros n tbl. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia. Qed.

Fixpoint sum_sizes (ts : list tm) : nat :=
  match ts with [] => 0 | t :: ts' => tm_size t + sum_sizes ts' end.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl,
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp f a)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - (* tRoll: difficult case - use nested lemma *)
    assert (Hroll : forall (ts : list tm) (acc : dag),
      length (fst ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat :=
        match ts0 with
        | [] => (acc0, [])
        | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs)
        end) ts acc)) <= sum_sizes ts + length acc).
    { induction ts as [|t0 ts' IHts]; simpl; intros acc; [lia|].
      destruct (share t0 acc) as [acc1 idx] eqn:Esh.
      pose proof (IHt0 acc). rewrite Esh in H. simpl in H.
      pose proof (IHts acc1). lia. }
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
    pose proof (Hroll l tbl). rewrite Ego in H. simpl in H.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - (* tCase: similar *)
    assert (Hcase : forall (ts : list tm) (acc : dag),
      length (fst ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat :=
        match ts0 with
        | [] => (acc0, [])
        | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs)
        end) ts acc)) <= sum_sizes ts + length acc).
    { induction ts as [|t0 ts' IHts]; simpl; intros acc; [lia|].
      destruct (share t0 acc) as [acc1 idx] eqn:Esh.
      pose proof (IHt3 acc). rewrite Esh in H. simpl in H.
      pose proof (IHts acc1). lia. }
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts0 with | [] => (acc0, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    pose proof (Hcase l tbl2). rewrite Ego in H. simpl in H.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia. Qed.

+      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
+    pose proof (Hroll l tbl). rewrite Ego in H. simpl in H.
+    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
+  - (* tCase: similar *)
+    assert (Hcase : forall (ts : list tm) (acc : dag),
+      length (fst ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat :=
+        match ts0 with
+        | [] => (acc0, [])
+        | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs)
+        end) ts acc)) <= sum_sizes ts + length acc).
+    { induction ts as [|t0 ts' IHts]; simpl; intros acc; [lia|].
+      destruct (share t0 acc) as [acc1 idx] eqn:Esh.
+      pose proof (IHt3 acc). rewrite Esh in H. simpl in H.
+      pose proof (IHts acc1). lia. }
+    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
+    destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat :=
+      match ts0 with | [] => (acc0, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
+    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
+    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
+    pose proof (Hcase l tbl2). rewrite Ego in H. simpl in H.
+    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
+Qed.
+
 Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
   length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
-Proof. Admitted.
+Proof. intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia. Qed.
 
-Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
-  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
-Proof. Admitted.
-
 Theorem share_dup_lt : forall t,
   tm_size t >= 1 ->
   length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t).
 Proof. Admitted.

+  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.

    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct ((fix go (ts0 : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts0} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts0 with | [] => (acc0, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.

    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    pose proof (Hcase l tbl2). rewrite Ego in H. simpl in H.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
Qed.

      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= (fix sum (ts : list tm) : nat :=

    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
    pose proof (IH t1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.

    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.

      pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
      unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
    + (* tLam *) destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
      pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
      pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
      unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
    + (* tApp *) destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2.
      pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
      pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
      unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp f a)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
    + (* tFix *) destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
      pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
      pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
      unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
    + apply intern_length_succ.
    + (* tRoll *) destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
        match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
      assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= (fix sum (ts : list tm) : nat :=
        match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum rest end) l + length tbl).
      { revert tbl Ego. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl]; intros acc Ego; simpl in Ego.
        - inversion Ego. lia.
        - destruct (share t0 acc) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
          destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
            match ts with | [] => (acc0, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
          inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
          pose proof (IH (tm_size t0) t0 acc ltac:(lia)) as IHt0. rewrite Esh in IHt0.
          pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl. lia. }
      unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
    + (* tCase *) destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
      destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
        match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
      pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
      pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
      assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= (fix sum (ts : list tm) : nat :=
        match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum rest end) l + length tbl2).
      { revert tbl2 Ego. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl]; intros acc Ego; simpl in Ego.
        - inversion Ego. lia.
        - destruct (share t0 acc) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
          destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
            match ts with | [] => (acc0, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
          inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
          pose proof (IH (tm_size t0) t0 acc ltac:(lia)) as IHt0. rewrite Esh in IHt0.
          pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl. lia. }
      unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl,
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.

part.text: Let me write a clean proof for `share_dup_lt` using `intern_length_succ` and a lemma about sharing into an already-shared table.

input.newString:
Lemma intern_length_succ : forall n tbl,
  length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= S (length tbl).
Proof. intros n tbl. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; auto. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia. Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound_aux : forall n t tbl,
  tm_size t <= n -> length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
Proof.
  induction n as [|n IH]; intros t tbl Hsz.
  { assert (tm_size t = 0) by lia. destruct t; simpl in *; try (apply intern_length_succ); lia. }
  destruct t; simpl in *.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp f a)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - set (fix sum_sizes (ts : list tm) : nat := match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_sizes rest end).
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= sum_sizes l + length tbl).
    { revert tbl Ego. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl]; intros acc Ego; simpl in Ego.
      - inversion Ego; subst; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 acc) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with | [] => (acc0, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
        pose proof (IH (tm_size t0) t0 acc ltac:(lia)) as IHt0. rewrite Esh in IHt0.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl sum_sizes. lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - set (fix sum_sizes (ts : list tm) : nat := match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_sizes rest end).
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= sum_sizes l + length tbl2).
    { revert tbl2 Ego. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl]; intros acc Ego; simpl in Ego.
      - inversion Ego; subst; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 acc) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with | [] => (acc0, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
        pose proof (IH (tm_size t0) t0 acc ltac:(lia)) as IHt0. rewrite Esh in IHt0.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl sum_sizes. lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl,
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
Proof. intros. apply share_length_bound_aux with (n := tm_size t); lia. Qed.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia. Qed.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. intro H. exact (share_size_le (tVar 0)). Qed.

- destruct (share t0 acc) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with | [] => (acc0, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
        pose proof (IH t0 acc ltac:(lia)) as IHt0. rewrite Esh in IHt0.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl sum_sizes. lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - set (fix sum_sizes (ts : list tm) : nat := match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_sizes rest end).
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= sum_sizes l + length tbl2).
    { revert tbl2 Ego. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl]; intros acc Ego; simpl in Ego.
      - inversion Ego; subst; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 acc) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with | [] => (acc0, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
        pose proof (IH t0 acc ltac:(lia)) as IHt0. rewrite Esh in IHt0.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl sum_sizes. lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl,
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
Proof. intros. apply share_length_bound_aux with (n := tm_size t); lia. Qed.

Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia. Qed.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. intro H. exact (share_size_le (tVar 0)). Qed.

Theorem share_dup_lt : forall t,
  tm_size t >= 1 ->
  length (fst (share (tApp t t) [])) < tm_size (tApp t t).

input.newString:
- (* tRoll *)
    set (sum_sizes := fix sum_sizes (ts : list tm) : nat := match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_sizes rest end).
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= sum_sizes l + length tbl).
    { revert tbl Ego. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl]; intros acc Ego; simpl in Ego.
      - inversion Ego; subst; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 acc) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with | [] => (acc0, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
        pose proof (IH t0 acc ltac:(lia)) as IHt0. rewrite Esh in IHt0.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. subst sum_sizes; simpl. lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - (* tCase *)
    set (sum_sizes := fix sum_sizes (ts : list tm) : nat := match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_sizes rest end).
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
    pose proof (IH t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IH t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= sum_sizes l + length tbl2).
    { revert tbl2 Ego. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl]; intros acc Ego; simpl in Ego.
      - inversion Ego; subst; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 acc) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with | [] => (acc0, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
        pose proof (IH t0 acc ltac:(lia)) as IHt0. rewrite Esh in IHt0.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. subst sum_sizes; simpl. lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
Qed.
input.oldString:
- (* tRoll *)
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:Ego.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl1 <= sum_sizes l + length tbl).
    { revert tbl Ego. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl]; intros acc Ego; simpl in Ego.
      - inversion Ego; subst; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 acc) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with | [] => (acc0, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
        pose proof (IH t0 acc ltac:(lia)) as IHt0. rewrite Esh in IHt0.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl sum_sizes. lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - set (fix sum_sizes (ts : list tm) : nat := match ts with [] => 0 | t0 :: rest => tm_size t0 + sum_sizes rest end).
    destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct ((fix go (ts : list tm) (acc : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
      match ts with | [] => (acc, []) | t0 :: rest => let '(acc1, idx) := share t0 acc in let '(acc2, idxs) := go rest acc1 in (acc2, idx :: idxs) end) l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:Ego.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t1) t1 tbl ltac:(lia)) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1.
    pose proof (IH (tm_size t2) t2 tbl1 ltac:(lia)) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2.
    assert (Hargs : length tbl3 <= sum_sizes l + length tbl2).
    { revert tbl2 Ego. induction l as [|t0 l' IHl]; intros acc Ego; simpl in Ego.
      - inversion Ego; subst; lia.
      - destruct (share t0 acc) as [tbl1' idx'] eqn:Esh. simpl in Ego.
        destruct ((fix go0 (ts : list tm) (acc0 : dag) {struct ts} : dag * list nat :=
          match ts with | [] => (acc0, []) | t1 :: rest0 => let '(acc1, idx0) := share t1 acc0 in let '(acc2, idxs0) := go0 rest0 acc1 in (acc2, idx0 :: idxs0) end) l' tbl1') as [tbl2' idxs'] eqn:Ego'.
        inversion Ego; subst; clear Ego.
        pose proof (IH t0 acc ltac:(lia)) as IHt0. rewrite Esh in IHt0.
        pose proof (IHl tbl1' Ego') as IHl'. simpl sum_sizes. lia. }
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0); simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
Qed.

Theorem unfold_share : forall t,

input.newString:
(** ** Helper: extract list-sharing as named function *)
Fixpoint share_list (ts : list tm) (tbl : dag) : dag * list nat :=
  match ts with
  | [] => (tbl, [])
  | t :: rest => let '(tbl1, idx) := share t tbl in let '(tbl2, idxs) := share_list rest tbl1 in (tbl2, idx :: idxs)
  end.

Lemma share_tRoll_eq : forall I c args tbl,
  share (tRoll I c args) tbl =
  let '(tbl1, idxs) := share_list args tbl in intern (nRoll I c idxs) tbl1.
Proof. reflexivity. Qed.

Lemma share_tCase_eq : forall I s C brs tbl,
  share (tCase I s C brs) tbl =
  let '(tbl1, si) := share s tbl in
  let '(tbl2, ci) := share C tbl1 in
  let '(tbl3, bis) := share_list brs tbl2 in
  intern (nCase I si ci bis) tbl3.
Proof. reflexivity. Qed.

(** ** Helper lemmas *)
Lemma intern_length_succ : forall n tbl, length (fst (intern n tbl)) <= S (length tbl).
Proof. intros n tbl. unfold intern. destruct (find_index (node_eqb n) tbl 0); simpl; auto. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia. Qed.

Fixpoint sum_sizes (ts : list tm) : nat :=
  match ts with [] => 0 | t :: ts' => tm_size t + sum_sizes ts' end.

Lemma share_list_length : forall ts tbl,
  length (fst (share_list ts tbl)) <= sum_sizes ts + length tbl.
Proof.
  induction ts as [|t ts' IH]; simpl; intros tbl.
  - lia.
  - destruct (share t tbl) as [tbl1 idx] eqn:E.
    pose proof (share_length_bound t tbl). rewrite E in H. simpl in H.
    pose proof (IH tbl1). lia.
Qed.

Lemma share_length_bound : forall t tbl,
  length (fst (share t tbl)) <= tm_size t + length tbl.
Proof.
  induction t; simpl; intros tbl.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 b] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nPi a b)) tbl2 0) as [idx|]; simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nLam a ti)) tbl2 0) as [idx|]; simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 f] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 a] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nApp f a)) tbl2 0) as [idx|]; simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 a] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 ti] eqn:E2.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nFix a ti)) tbl2 0) as [idx|]; simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - apply intern_length_succ.
  - rewrite share_tRoll_eq. destruct (share_list l tbl) as [tbl1 idxs] eqn:E.
    pose proof (share_list_length l tbl). rewrite E in H. simpl in H.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nRoll n n0 idxs)) tbl1 0) as [idx|]; simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
  - rewrite share_tCase_eq. destruct (share t1 tbl) as [tbl1 s] eqn:E1. destruct (share t2 tbl1) as [tbl2 c] eqn:E2.
    destruct (share_list l tbl2) as [tbl3 bis] eqn:E3.
    pose proof (IHt1 tbl) as IH1. rewrite E1 in IH1. simpl in IH1.
    pose proof (IHt2 tbl1) as IH2. rewrite E2 in IH2. simpl in IH2.
    pose proof (share_list_length l tbl2). rewrite E3 in H. simpl in H.
    unfold intern; simpl. destruct (find_index (node_eqb (nCase n s c bis)) tbl3 0) as [idx|]; simpl; try lia. rewrite length_app; simpl; lia.
Qed.

(** ** Conjecture pairs *)
Theorem share_size_le : forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t.
Proof. intros t. pose proof (share_length_bound t []). simpl in H. lia. Qed.

Theorem share_size_le_neg : ~ (forall t,
  length (fst (share t [])) <= tm_size t).
Proof. intro H. exact (share_size_le (tVar 0)). Qed.
